title: xanthoxerampellia muelleri
intro: Xanthoxerampellia muelleri, also known as the African spurge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, Xanthoxerampellia muelleri is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices for its medicinal and therapeutic applications.
